---
title: "CIPSE RDS Analysis"
author: "Peter Kaberia"
editor: visual
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
    code-fold: true
    number-sections: true
    df-print: tibble
params:
  site: "Nairobi"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## 1. Overview

This document summarizes the reconciliation between coupon codes in the tracking form and the main survey dataset for the Eldoret RDS study.

## 2. Coupon Summary Table

```{r, echo=FALSE}
library(tibble)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

coupon_summary <- tribble(
  ~Category, ~Count,
  "Coupons Issued (CTF)", 437,
  "Survey Records (Main Data)", 432,
  "Orphan Coupons", 27,
  "Valid Coupons (Cleaned CTF)", 410,
  "Valid Coupons in Both CTF & Survey", 390,
  "Invalid Coupons in Survey Only", 31,
  "Orphan Coupons Used in Survey", 24,
  "Valid Coupons Never Used", 18
)

coupon_summary
```
